question: You named your aunts (Sit Zakia, Esmat, Akhtar) and your uncle Kamal Ghafoor Agha. Of those five — Sit Zakia, your mother Shafiqha, Esmat, Akhtar, and Kamal — who is still living, and where? When did the others pass? Are there cousins or children of theirs we should know about?
answer: Unfortunately, they are all dead now and my aunts they have children it’s our
